rule_text: When citing clinical data, avoid negative or fear-based language and use an empathetic, supportive, trust-building tone without oversimplifying.
intent: Present clinical information with empathy while preserving its meaning.
snippets: Participants in the VALOR study taking LISRAYA had nearly 50% more improvement in their DM symptoms after one year compared to placebo.
summary: Use empathetic, supportive, non-fearful tone with clinical data; avoid negative language, maintain trust, don’t oversimplify.
